narrative:
Cols 14-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,985 registered voters, with 60.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 11.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 28.1%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 16.5 percentage points.
